# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for supply chain security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline - Build and Deploy

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read
  packages: write
  security-events: write

jobs:
  security-audit:
    name: Dependency Security Audit
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies with lockfile enforcement
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Run npm audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner (filesystem)
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          scan-type: 'fs'
          scan-ref: '.'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-fs-results.sarif'

      - name: Upload Trivy scan results to GitHub Security tab
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3
        if: always()
        with:
          sarif_file: 'trivy-fs-results.sarif'

  generate-sbom:
    name: Generate SBOM
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [security-audit]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies with lockfile enforcement
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts

      - name: Generate SBOM with CycloneDX
        run: npx @cyclonedx/cyclonedx-npm --output-file sbom.json --output-format json

      - name: Upload SBOM as artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: sbom
          path: sbom.json
          retention-days: 90

  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [security-audit]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Verify package-lock.json integrity
        run: |
          if [ ! -f package-lock.json ]; then
            echo "ERROR: package-lock.json not found. Lockfile is required for reproducible builds."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Install dependencies with lockfile enforcement
        run: npm ci

      - name: Run linter
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build application
        run: npm run build

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 30

  build-container:
    name: Build and Scan Container Image
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output
          path: dist/

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Log in to GitHub Container Registry
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v5
        with:
          images: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=sha,prefix=
            type=ref,event=branch
            latest

      - name: Build Docker image (local load for scanning)
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          load: true
          tags: local-scan:latest
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

      - name: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner on container image
        uses: aquasecurity/trivy-action@master
        with:
          image-ref: 'local-scan:latest'
          severity: 'CRITICAL,HIGH'
          exit-code: '1'
          format: 'sarif'
          output: 'trivy-image-results.sarif'

      - name: Upload Trivy image scan results
        uses: github/codeql-action/upload-sarif@v3
        if: always()
        with:
          sarif_file: 'trivy-image-results.sarif'

      - name: Push Docker image (only if scan passed)
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
          provenance: true
          sbom: true

  deploy:
    name: Deploy to Production
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [build-container, generate-sbom]
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    environment:
      name: production
      url: ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_URL }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Download SBOM
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: sbom
          path: ./sbom/

      - name: Deploy application
        env:
          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
          IMAGE_TAG: ${{ github.sha }}
        run: |
          echo "Deploying image ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}:${IMAGE_TAG}"
          # Replace with actual deployment command, e.g.:
          # kubectl set image deployment/app app=ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}:${IMAGE_TAG}
          # or helm upgrade, etc.

      - name: Verify deployment health
        run: |
          echo "Running post-deployment health checks..."
          # Replace with actual health check
          # curl -f ${{ vars.PRODUCTION_URL }}/health || exit 1
